sources.label: Current psycho-educational assessment notes
sources.content: Referral for learning concerns in reading fluency and written expression. Examiner notes full-term birth per parent report collected at intake. No prior formal special education eligibility documented in the referral packet. Student presents as cooperative during testing.

sources.label: School cumulative file summary (stale age planted)
sources.content: Cumulative file dated 2024-09-01 states student is 7 years old and in 2nd grade. Attendance generally regular. Teacher notes slow progress in phonics. No SST interventions listed in this summary sheet. (NOTE FOR BUILDERS: the '7 years old' line is intentionally stale relative to dob+evaluation_date.)

sources.label: School records — intervention log
sources.content: 2024–2025 school year: Tier 2 reading intervention 3x/week starting October 2024. Progress monitoring shows limited growth in ORF. No IEP or 504 plan in place as of May 2025.

sources.label: Parent developmental history form
sources.content: Pregnancy: uncomplicated. Birth: full-term, vaginal, no NICU. Early milestones: walked at 13 months, first words around 12 months, two-word phrases by 24 months. Parent reports no major medical hospitalizations. Sleep generally good. Parent reports concerns began in kindergarten with letter-sound learning. Parent states preschool was typical and enjoyable. CONFLICT PLANT: Parent reports student received private tutoring in 1st grade; school intervention log does not mention private tutoring.

sources.label: Current classroom teacher questionnaire
sources.content: Grade 4 teacher: reading fluency below grade peers; spelling weak; math computation average. Behavior: attentive, anxious when called on to read aloud. Homework completion inconsistent when writing is required.
